translatedContent: ### 主要功能
- **标准化通信：** 使用 JSON-RPC 2.0 通过 HTTP(S)。

originContent: - **Agent Discovery:** Via "Agent Cards" detailing capabilities and connection info.
translatedContent: - **代理发现：** 通过“代理卡”提供能力和连接信息。

originContent: - **Flexible Interaction:** Supports synchronous request/response, streaming (SSE), and asynchronous push notifications.
translatedContent: - **灵活交互：** 支持同步请求/响应、流式（SSE）和异步推送通知。

originContent: - **Rich Data Exchange:** Handles text, files, and structured JSON data.
translatedContent: - **丰富数据交换：** 支持文本、文件和结构化 JSON 数据。

originContent: - **Enterprise-Ready:** Designed with security, authentication, and observability in mind.
translatedContent: - **企业级准备：** 设计时考虑安全性、认证和可观测性。
## 入门指南

originContent: - 📚 **Explore the Documentation:** Visit the [Agent2Agent Protocol Documentation Site](https://a2a-protocol.org) for a complete overview, the full protocol specification, tutorials, and guides.
translatedContent: - 📚 **查阅文档：** 访问 [Agent2Agent 协议文档站点](https://a2a-protocol.org) 获取完整概览、协议规范、教程和指南。
- 📝 **查看规范：** [A2A 协议规范](https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/specification/)
- 使用 SDK：
- [🐍 A2A Python SDK](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-python) `pip install a2a-sdk`
- [🐿️ A2A Go SDK](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-go) `go get github.com/a2aproject/a2a-go`
- [🧑‍💻 A2A JS SDK](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-js) `npm install @a2a-js/sdk`
- [☕️ A2A Java SDK](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-java) 使用 maven
- [🔷 A2A .NET SDK](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-dotnet) 使用 [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/A2A) `dotnet add package A2A`
- [🦀 A2A Rust SDK](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-rs) `cargo add a2a-lf`

originContent: - 🎬 Use our [samples](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-samples) to see A2A in action
translatedContent: - 🎬 使用我们的 [示例](https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-samples) 查看 A2A 实际应用
## 贡献

originContent: We welcome community contributions to enhance and evolve the A2A protocol!
translatedContent: 我们欢迎社区贡献来增强和发展 A2A 协议！
- **问题与讨论：** 加入我们的 [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A/discussions)。

originContent: - **Issues & Feedback:** Report issues or suggest improvements via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A/issues).
translatedContent: - **问题与反馈：** 通过 [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A/issues) 报告问题或提出建议。

originContent: - **Contribution Guide:** See our [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/a2aproject/A2A/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for details on how to contribute.
translatedContent: - **贡献指南：** 查看我们的 [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/a2aproject/A2A/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) 了解贡献细节。
- **私密反馈：** 使用此 [Google 表单](https://goo.gle/a2a-feedback)。

originContent: - **Partner Program:** Google Cloud customers can join our partner program via this [form](https://goo.gle/a2a-partner).
translatedContent: - **合作伙伴计划：** Google Cloud 客户可通过此 [表单](https://goo.gle/a2a-partner)加入合作伙伴计划。
## 后续计划
### 协议增强
- **代理发现：**

originContent: - Formalize inclusion of authorization schemes and optional credentials directly within the `AgentCard`.
translatedContent: - 正式将授权方案和可选凭证直接包含在 `AgentCard` 中。
- **代理协作：**

originContent: - Investigate a `QuerySkill()` method for dynamically checking unsupported or unanticipated skills.
translatedContent: - 探索 `QuerySkill()` 方法以动态检查不支持或未预料的技能。
- **任务生命周期与用户体验：**

originContent: - Support for dynamic UX negotiation _within_ a task (e.g., agent adding audio/video mid-conversation).
translatedContent: - 支持任务内部的动态用户体验协商（例如，代理在对话中途添加音频/视频）。
- **客户端方法与传输：**

originContent: - Explore extending support to client-initiated methods (beyond task management).
translatedContent: - 探索扩展对客户端发起方法的支持（不仅限于任务管理）。

originContent: - Improvements to streaming reliability and push notification mechanisms.
translatedContent: - 改进流式传输的可靠性和推送通知机制。
## 关于

originContent: The A2A Protocol is an open source project under the Linux Foundation, contributed by Google. It is licensed under the [Apache License 2.0](LICENSE) and is open to contributions from the community.
translatedContent: A2A 协议是一个在 Linux 基金会旗下的开源项目，由 Google 贡献。它遵循 [Apache License 2.0](LICENSE) 许可，并对社区贡献开放。
